headline: Otis Announces 5 Percent Increase in Quarterly Dividend to $0.44 per Share
summary: The Otis Worldwide Corporation (NYSE: OTIS) Board of Directors today declared a quarterly dividend of $0.44 per share of Otis' common stock, representing a 5% increase. The dividend will be payable on June 12, 2026, to shareholders of record at the close of business on May 15, 2026.

headline: Otis (OTIS) Reports Q1: Everything You Need To Know Ahead Of Earnings
summary: Elevator manufacturer Otis (NYSE:OTIS) will be reporting results this Wednesday morning. Here’s what to expect.
